name: ripe-atlas
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`ripe-atlas` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/supabase/terraform-provider-ripe-atlas).

namespace.description: Namespace embedded in each measurement description on the RIPE Atlas API. Used to distinguish measurements across Terraform states or workspaces. Defaults to "terraform-provider-ripe-atlas".

snapshot.description: Path to the probe snapshot JSON file. Falls back to RIPE_ATLAS_SNAPSHOT env var.

excludeProbeIds.description: Set of probe IDs never selected in this cohort.

includeProbeIds.description: Set of probe IDs always included in the cohort, regardless of scoring or the H3 cell cap.

intervalSeconds.description: Measurement interval in seconds. Minimum `60`.

maxProbesPerCell.description: Maximum probes per H3 geographic cell.

msmId.description: RIPE Atlas measurement ID assigned to this cohort.

probeIds.description: Probe IDs selected for this cohort.

asn.description: Map of ASN (string key) to score bonus.

countries.description: Map of ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to score bonus.

stability.description: Map of RIPE Atlas stability tag to score bonus.

tags.description: Map of probe tag string to score bonus.

provider.description:
The provider type for the ripe-atlas package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

namespace.description: Namespace embedded in each measurement description on the RIPE Atlas API. Used to distinguish measurements across Terraform states or workspaces. Defaults to "terraform-provider-ripe-atlas".

snapshot.description: Path to the probe snapshot JSON file. Falls back to RIPE_ATLAS_SNAPSHOT env var.

namespace.description: Namespace embedded in each measurement description on the RIPE Atlas API. Used to distinguish measurements across Terraform states or workspaces. Defaults to "terraform-provider-ripe-atlas".

snapshot.description: Path to the probe snapshot JSON file. Falls back to RIPE_ATLAS_SNAPSHOT env var.

cohorts.description: Ordered list of cohorts. Each creates one RIPE Atlas measurement. Selection runs in order; each cohort draws from the remaining probe pool after prior cohorts have claimed their probes.
Ordered list of cohorts. Each creates one RIPE Atlas measurement. Selection runs in order; each cohort draws from the remaining probe pool after prior cohorts have claimed their probes.

stateInputs.description: Input properties used for looking up and filtering Measurement resources.

cohorts.description: Ordered list of cohorts. Each creates one RIPE Atlas measurement. Selection runs in order; each cohort draws from the remaining probe pool after prior cohorts have claimed their probes.

pulumi:providers:ripe-atlas/terraformCon.description: This function returns a Terraform config object with terraform-namecased keys,to be used with the Terraform Module Provider.
